textByHash.5bbda97c1669bde0a7c645aed4a0ad727fac8899: Came up with it myself, mate. I'm a bit of a naming specialist you see.
textByHash.ed27a016a518717ed1f1c6c404ed6b9683fde743: Aye. Tell you what, mate, you look like a bit of a sailor. Want me to rename your boat for you? Will only cost you a single glass of cider.
textByHash.4efb6d0d2868a5f7a3748c5a63bdfd1f4a15d3e4: Sure thing, mate. Which one do you want me to rename?
textByHash.a62b0c32cd5a925a64daa821d0dddb5d25c332ad: Alright, the price is one glass of cider.
textByHash.7c80f1a828370e333abc01460538d8fb8c92d844: Crying shame, mate. A crying shame indeed.
textByHash.c6cb08306068d24ba7bf7ad9228e737224c90d8c: Alright, mate, I name your boat... !
textByHash.7df7fd0d8655764f3f727bedf1d0f9cf4dff932a: Was crew on some fancy merchant ship, but me and Biles went and fell off. Now we live here. It's just the two of us, but it's quite the effective kingdom we've established.
textByHash.5515fadd8013336522d1a6d7629f16f63a17252f: Aye. Biles is the King. He's the one that runs things. Meanwhile, I handle the naming of everything.
